body:
this test fails frequently in the last few weeks.

```
FAILED   ...im/build/Xtest_xdg_ui/test/functional/ui/output_spec.lua @ 73: shell command :! throttles shell-command output greater than ~10KB
...im/build/Xtest_xdg_ui/test/functional/ui/output_spec.lua:73: Failed to match any screen lines.
Expected (anywhere): "
%."
Actual:
  |29997: foo                                        |
  |29998: foo                                        |
  |29999: foo                                        |
  |30000: foo                                        |
  |                                                  |
  |{123:Press ENTER or type command to continue}^           |
  |{5:-- TERMINAL --}                                    |



Snapshot:
screen:expect([[
  29997: foo                                        |
  29998: foo                                        |
  29999: foo                                        |
  30000: foo                                        |
                                                    |
  {123:Press ENTER or type command to continue}^           |
  {5:-- TERMINAL --}                                    |
]])
stack traceback:
	test/functional/ui/screen.lua:913: in function '_wait'
	test/functional/ui/screen.lua:536: in function 'expect'
	...im/build/Xtest_xdg_ui/test/functional/ui/output_spec.lua:73: in function <...im/build/Xtest_xdg_ui/test/functional/ui/output_spec.lua:66>
```

labels.description: automation for build, test, and release
labels.name: ci

title: unreliable test: `output_spec.lua: shell command :! throttles output greater than ~10KB`
